_comment: Fixtures for P5 verbatim-citation discipline. Each entry seeds a Principle and a synthesizer chain step that cites it. 'expected' is the outcome that the validator MUST produce: 'reject' for fabricated or mistyped principle_ids, 'accept' for exact governing-set citations. Future maintainers: do NOT delete fixtures that look 'weird' — each one is a known fabrication shape that the validator has to refuse.

principles.text: Calibration drift exceeding the mean-Brier ceiling forces a pause on every live submission until human review.

cases.name: exact_principle_id_accepted
cases.derived_fact: Mean-Brier > 0.30 over the last 50 resolutions, so pause.
cases.attack: Honest path: the cited principle_id exists in the governing set.

cases.name: fabricated_principle_id_rejected
cases.attack: Fabricated source — the LLM invented a principle_id.

cases.name: almost_verbatim_principle_id_rejected
cases.derived_fact: Almost-right id — capital-O substituted for the trailing 001.
cases.attack: Homoglyph attack: a single character changed in the principle_id should still be refused.

cases.name: blank_principle_id_rejected
cases.attack: Drop-the-citation: a missing principle_id is a fabrication-by-omission.
